title: Copying a Dashboard

posts.author: nickmaxwell (Nick Maxwell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Is it possible to copy the contents of a dashboard into a new dashboard ? We currently have a dashboard set up for the month of July that pulls together various costings for July and displays them on that page.

Ideally I would like to take the same layout for July and copy it over to an August dashboard - where all I have to do is to then change the filters on the widgets over to August .

posts.author: Qassam-monday.com (Qassam Atme)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nickmaxwell - While the possibility to copy whole dashboards is not possible yet, you can duplicate widgets inside the dashboard itself.

The capability to duplicate dashboards will be enabled as we are constantly working to improve our reporting and analytical tools. Hence, I’ll be happy to learn what other features you’d like to see in our dashboard.

Let me know

posts.author: nickmaxwell (Nick Maxwell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Qassam

Duplicating dashboards would be very useful - although I see your latest release has the ability to breakdown charts based on date which is what I have been using Dashboard widgets for

Many Thanks

Nick
